---
title: "LLM Project: Executive Summary"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(llm)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)
library(scales)
library(here)

# Load data for summary
daily_data <- load_cached_ccusage("daily", project_filter = NULL)
```

Welcome to the **LLM Project Dashboard**. This page provides a high-level overview of system status and resource consumption.

## Current Status

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
### 💰 Today's Spend
```{r spend-today, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(daily_data) && nrow(daily_data) > 0) {
  today_row <- daily_data |>
    filter(date == max(date)) |>
    summarise(
      Date = format(max(date), "%Y-%m-%d"),
      Spend = scales::dollar(sum(totalCost))
    )
  knitr::kable(today_row, align = c("l", "r"))
} else {
  knitr::kable(
    data.frame(Date = "—", Spend = "No data"),
    align = c("l", "r")
  )
}
```
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### 📊 Weekly Trend
```{r weekly-spend, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(daily_data) && nrow(daily_data) > 0) {
  weekly_tbl <- daily_data |>
    mutate(week_start = as.Date(date) - as.integer(format(as.Date(date), "%u")) + 1) |>
    filter(week_start >= Sys.Date() - 20) |>
    group_by(Week = week_start) |>
    summarise(Spend = scales::dollar(sum(totalCost)), .groups = "drop") |>
    arrange(desc(Week)) |>
    head(3)
  knitr::kable(weekly_tbl, align = c("l", "r"))
} else {
  knitr::asis_output("No data")
}
```
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### 🛠️ Active Issues
```{r issues, echo=FALSE}
issues_tbl <- data.frame(
  Status = c("Open", "Closed", "Reopened"),
  Count  = c(4L, 141L, 0L)
)
knitr::kable(issues_tbl, align = c("l", "r"))
```
:::

:::

## Articles

- <a href="vignettes/closeread-infrastructure.html" target="_blank">**From Nix Shells to Project Outputs**</a>: Software layers, LLM harness (rules/skills/agents/hooks/memory), irishbuoys pipeline case study, FOCUS framework.
- <a href="vignettes/telemetry.html" target="_blank">**Project Telemetry**</a>: LLM usage & costs, session efficiency, CI & Git stats, project structure.

## Quick Links

- <a href="vignettes/telemetry.html#llm-usage-costs" target="_blank">LLM Usage & Costs</a>: Detailed breakdown of token types and model costs.
- <a href="vignettes/telemetry.html#session-efficiency" target="_blank">Session Efficiency</a>: Analysis of Claude Max5 blocks and cost intensity.
- <a href="vignettes/telemetry.html#ci-git-stats" target="_blank">CI & Git Stats</a>: GitHub Actions performance and commit history.
- <a href="vignettes/telemetry.html#project-structure" target="_blank">Project Structure</a>: File organization and repository health.

---

*Last updated: `r Sys.time()`*
